log: === INITIATIVE ===
Young Red Dragon: 17 (d20:17 + 0)
Siren — Bardic Musician: 16 (d20:14 + 2)
=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Siren — Bardic Musician HP: 55/67
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Siren — Bardic Musician HP: 42/67
⚡ Siren — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:12 total 22 vs AC 14 — still hits.
--- Siren — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Siren — Bardic Musician casts Hypnotic Pattern (3rd level)
→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL
→ Young Red Dragon gains: charmed_hp, incapacitated
Siren — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Siren — Bardic Musician for 9. HP: 51/67
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Siren — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Siren — Bardic Musician casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 5 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Siren — Bardic Musician HP: 36/67

→ Concentration save: [20 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
⚡ Siren — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:16 total 26 vs AC 14 — still hits.
--- Siren — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Siren — Bardic Musician casts Vicious Mockery
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS!
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Siren — Bardic Musician HP: 5/67
→ Concentration save: [22 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS!
--- Siren — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Siren — Bardic Musician casts Greater Invisibility (4th level)
→ Siren — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Siren — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
